response:
sarah owns a small retail shop that supports local factory workers by selling their handmade products.
she decides to run a promotional week where she offers a 15% discount on all items produced by the factory workers.
***
if a customer purchases a handcrafted table originally priced at $200 and a set of factory-made chairs originally priced at $150, how much does the customer pay for these items during the promotional week?
remember to apply the discount to each item separately.
***
reach out to the yard for milk and more milk.
